headline_finding: apps/local-research-agent/ is a README-only placeholder. Flagship validation target is non-viable as picked. Recommend pivoting to apps/local-rag/.

findings.summary: local-research-agent cannot be the flagship validation target — README only, no source
Three apps are README-only placeholders (local-research-agent, mcu-sensor-monitor-tiny-max, sovereign-memory-os)
findings.remediation: Implement (weeks each) OR demote to apps/_placeholder/ with tracked retirement record
findings.scope_note: 2 hours per demotion x 3 apps = 6h for demotion path; weeks for implementation path

findings.summary: Three apps are 2-file stubs missing run.ts (ad_factory, creator_outreach, video-ad-factory)
findings.remediation: Add canonical 5-line run.ts wrapper if backend exists, else demote/retire

findings.summary: Backend wiring unverified for 5 of 7 thin-shell apps (chat_starter, chat_ui, code_engineer, graph-toolkit, snowball_engine)
findings.remediation: Add tool_routing_authority CI guard asserting every apps/*/app.json with layer=app has a matching core/layer0/ops/ domain handler. Track as V11-APP-VALIDATION-001-FOLLOWUP-001.

findings.summary: local-research-agent README documents commands (research fetch, research diagnostics, think) with no core domain handlers
findings.remediation: Delete or revise suggested-commands section as part of the F1 pivot

findings.summary: personas/rohan-kapoor and lensmap inflate apps/ inventory but are sample data and a separate product respectively
findings.remediation: Note in playbook (V11-APP-VALIDATION-009) that these are not validation candidates

findings.summary: PR1 of legacy_process_runner deletion (commit 086ca76b8) affects every thin-shell app's runtime path via the shared run_infring_ops bridge
findings.remediation: No remediation required; mention this in V11-OPS-PRD-001-PR1 soak notes so any thin-shell app regressing is recognized as a PR1 effect

rationale: local-rag has the canonical 3-file thin-shell shape so V11-APP-VALIDATION-001..002 are reduced
local-rag has a real backend route (rag -> core://rag)
local-rag exercises memory + retrieval + chat — high-value validation surface
local-rag documents real commands (start, ingest, search, chat, memory search)

out_of_scope_for_this_audit: Backend wiring verification for chat_starter, chat_ui, code_engineer, graph-toolkit, snowball_engine
Assessment of apps/examples and apps/prism as alternative flagship targets
